prompt: Create a visually explosive vertical 3D social media advertisement render of a stylish young male AI influencer standing confidently in a futuristic Instagram-inspired creator studio. The central subject is Dilshad Hussain, full body from head to thighs, facing forward, one hand lifted to an earpiece near his ear, wearing a glossy gradient bomber jacket in cyan, lavender, and pink over a black shirt, with taupe cargo pants and black cuffs. Use realistic 3D character proportions and cinematic lighting; keep the face centered and realistic, or use an uploaded facial reference if provided. The studio is a circular high-tech room with curved cyan LED dot-matrix walls, transparent glass panels, magenta neon trim, a glowing pink circular ceiling ring, smoky atmosphere, reflective dark floor, and strong blue-pink rim lighting. Add large floating neon typography across the lower center in two lines: the first line says Dilshad Hussain in bright cyan outlined glow, and the second line says Ai influencer in hot pink neon glow, angled slightly across the subject. Surround him with exactly 10 floating social media UI elements: 1 Instagram app logo near the upper right, 1 follower count speech bubble reading 24.3K near the upper right chest area, 4 pink heart notification bubbles placed left middle, right middle, bottom right, and a large blurred foreground one at bottom left, and 4 Reels/play icons placed upper left, lower left, bottom left, and lower right. Include a subtle futuristic holographic HUD panel glowing on the subject’s chest. Make the image vibrant, glossy, premium, high contrast, depth-of-field, volumetric haze, and suitable for a social media promotion poster. Avoid extra text, avoid watermarks, and keep the composition centered and dramatic.
